excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap is a validated RoPE replacement
supported: A deterministic multi-initialization attention-bridge comparison on the Stage 26 compact QA packet.
Evidence about whether learned nonlinear attention over PhaseWrap-derived candidate features is competitive on this compact non-PhaseWrap-labeled task.
Confidence intervals over initialization seeds and explicit weak-run reporting.

model.trained_parameters: feature-to-hidden weights, hidden bias, hidden-to-attention-logit weights, logit bias

task.description: Compact train-short/test-long key-value QA attention bridge with explicit content keys.
task.scope: This is a compact attention/value bridge, not a full decoder-only language-model benchmark.
task.target_construction: The target is the latest candidate with the matching content key; it is not selected by the PhaseWrap score.
